ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Arunachal Pradesh, Anjaw, Changlang) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Geographic area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "healthcare_facilities" INTEGER /* Number of healthcare facilities in the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the region's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the health indicator (e.g., Total number of pregnant women Registered for ANC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health indicator */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the health indicator (e.g., maternal health, child immunization) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the indicator's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region from which the data was collected */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was collected */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES health_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maternal_health" (
  "maternal_health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maternal health data point */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region from which the data was collected */,
  "total_pregnant_women" INTEGER /* Total number of pregnant women */,
  "pregnant_women_registered_first_trimester" INTEGER /* Number of pregnant women registered within the first trimester */,
  "pregnant_women_received_four_or_more_anc_check_ups" INTEGER /* Number of pregnant women who received four or more antenatal care check-ups */,
  "total_live_births" INTEGER /* Total number of live births */,
  "postnatal_care_visits" INTEGER /* Number of postnatal care visits */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maternal_health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maternal_health_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "child_immunization" (
  "child_immunization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each child immunization data point */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region from which the data was collected */,
  "number_of_infants_given_opv_0" INTEGER /* Number of infants given OPV 0 (birth dose) */,
  "number_of_infants_given_bcg" INTEGER /* Number of infants given BCG */,
  "number_of_infants_given_dpt1" INTEGER /* Number of infants given DPT1 */,
  "total_infants" INTEGER /* Total number of infants */,
  "infants_given_all_vaccines" INTEGER /* Number of infants who have received all recommended vaccines */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("child_immunization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_child_immunization_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_planning" (
  "family_planning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family planning data point */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region from which the data was collected */,
  "number_of_vasectomies_conducted" INTEGER /* Number of vasectomies conducted */,
  "number_of_tubectomies_conducted" INTEGER /* Number of tubectomies conducted */,
  "total_sterilisation_conducted" INTEGER /* Total number of sterilizations conducted */,
  "total_couples_protected" INTEGER /* Total number of couples using family planning methods */,
  "contraceptive_prevalence_rate" REAL /* Percentage of women using modern contraception */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_planning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_planning_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare professional, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., Pediatrics, Obstetrics) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data used to generate the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the report was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
